title: Jekyll Data Files
claim_supported: _data files are loaded and accessible via site.data
limitations: Build-time data only; folder scanning needs plugin or prebuild script

title: Jekyll Plugins on GitHub Pages
scope: GitHub Pages plugin safe mode limitation
claim_supported: custom plugins are disabled by GitHub Pages safe mode unless using a workflow/prebuild
limitations: Use Python prebuild for GitHub Pages compatibility

title: Bootstrap 5.3 Collapse
claim_supported: collapse uses show/collapsing classes and animated height transitions
limitations: Fade effect added locally on top of Bootstrap behavior

title: OpenWrt Table of Hardware
scope: Router/network-device import seed and compatibility categories
claim_supported: OpenWrt ToH lists supported hardware devices
limitations: Device-specific support still requires per-model review

title: Linux Vendor Firmware Service
scope: Firmware metadata source class for Linux desktop/laptop/peripherals
claim_supported: LVFS provides firmware metadata for fwupd clients
limitations: Not every vendor/device participates

title: USB ID Repository
claim_supported: public repository of known USB vendor/device/class IDs
limitations: Identifier registry, not a device manual/source of compatibility alone

title: systemd hwdb
claim_supported: hwdb maps modalias-like keys to udev properties
limitations: Metadata mapping; not proof of full device support

title: AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D Desktop Processor
claim_supported: AMD publishes official specs and OS-support notes for Ryzen 7 7800X3D
limitations: No inferred motherboard compatibility without board source

title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090
claim_supported: NVIDIA publishes official RTX 4090 specs
limitations: Board-partner SKUs require separate endpoints

title: Samsung Galaxy S23 Specs
scope: Samsung Galaxy S23 device endpoint source
claim_supported: Samsung publishes Galaxy S23 features/specifications
limitations: Regional model and firmware builds require separate source records

title: SamFW SM-S911B Firmware Listing
claim_supported: SamFW indexes Galaxy S23 SM-S911B firmware builds and metadata
limitations: Third-party metadata; firmware flashing risk; not a safety guarantee

title: Pixel phone hardware tech specs
claim_supported: Google publishes Pixel hardware specifications
limitations: Exact regional model numbers require additional device/label evidence

title: Factory Images for Nexus and Pixel Devices
claim_supported: Google publishes factory image files and cautions about safer OTA sideload/full restore context
limitations: Flashing can reset data and requires exact model/version matching

title: Identify your iPhone model
claim_supported: Apple lists iPhone 15 model numbers and regions
limitations: Firmware signing/current version is time-sensitive

title: Apple Configurator update/restore devices
claim_supported: Apple Configurator can update/restore by dragging an .ipsw file onto a selected device
limitations: Signed-version availability/currentness must be verified live

title: How to check your model number
claim_supported: Nintendo lists Switch OLED HEG-001, Switch HAC-001, and Switch Lite HDH-001 model-number locations
limitations: Firmware/package metadata remains separate

title: PlayStation manuals
claim_supported: Sony/PlayStation publishes console and accessory manuals
limitations: Service manuals may not be official/current

title: PS3 Online User's Guide
claim_supported: Sony PS3 user guide explains PS3 system software usage
limitations: Online services/features may change

title: Xbox system updates
claim_supported: Xbox support explains where to find console OS version and lists updates
limitations: Current OS version is time-sensitive

title: Systems Emulated by MAME
claim_supported: MAME can emulate tens of thousands of systems and covers arcade/home/business systems
limitations: Compatibility of each machine requires per-driver review
